programmes.show_description: A young man denies 'mooning' his girlfriend's aunt and throwing rocks at her car after a dispute over a loan; they claim the money was a gift. S18, Ep259
After an altercation about a defective wheel chair, a man sues his former sober living roommate for having him falsely arrested for a knife attack. S18, Ep260
A woman is unaware that the home she inherited from her father has a $400k outstanding loan on it and is in danger of being foreclosed. S24, Ep1
After a man is attacked by two Pit Bulls while taking a stroll around the block, he sues his neighbour for pain and suffering. S22, Ep106
Teenagers accuse each other of infidelity amidst allegations of vehicle vandalism; the Judge teaches a young man 'new' words. S22, Ep107
A woman thinks her life would make a fascinating book but says the writer she hired delivered subpar material. S22, Ep108
A man accused of coming into court with unclean hands regarding a botched co-op deal is put in his place after talking back to Her Honor. S22, Ep109
A young man sets off to Paris with his girlfriend only to allegedly beg mom for money once he gets there; she sues him for payback. S22, Ep110
When a young man exhibits allegedly poor restaurant manners, an outraged father takes justice into his own hands. S22, Ep111
Bricks are thrown and assault charges are filed when two women fight over the same unemployed man; the Judge sets them straight. S22, Ep112
Adults who met as teenagers reconnect after ten years and begin a relationship; it ends in a fight over a car. He claims she is still married, and she says he's a user. S16, Ep49
When Melissa Vanover meets jewellery salesman, Michael Nieman, she thinks she has found her knight in shining armour. One day, Nieman is found shot dead in his own bed S3, Ep2

After meeting in a homeless shelter, ex-roommates fight over alleged vandalism and highly suspicious CPS reports. S22, Ep80
Parents of two children fight over alleged vehicle vandalism, bleached clothes and a car crash. S22, Ep81
